home.title: Manage Your Daily Tasks
home.description: The best platform to manage your daily tasks and projects. Fast, secure, and stylish.

login.title: Login
login.description: Login to your NextJS Template account to access your dashboard and projects.

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Sign up and start managing your projects for free. Quick registration, no credit card required.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Set a new and secure password for your NextJS Template account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address to complete your registration.

verifyEmailNotice.title: Check Your Email
verifyEmailNotice.description: We have sent you a verification link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your projects, tasks, and team from your personal dashboard.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View and edit your personal profile, preferences, and account settings.

adminLogin.title: Admin Sign In
adminLogin.description: Sign in to the administration area to manage users and view activity.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.description: Administrative overview of users, activity, and system health.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.description: Search, filter, update, and deactivate user accounts.

adminUserDetail.title: User Details
adminUserDetail.description: Edit a user, manage their status, and review their activity log.

adminActivities.title: Activity Log
adminActivities.description: Browse audit events across all users.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

error.title: An Error Occurred
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
